          @tanstack/virtual

</HomePage.Root>

# Overview

```tsx twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"17ebd7f58c307406613c149fef28c86293b317f92788b9d783f2d7ddadfcf869","data":""}
import { Masonry } from 'kaskaid';

const HEIGHTS = [200, 600, 200, 400, 100, 100, 50, 200];

<Masonry
  data={HEIGHTS}
  ssr={{ itemCount: HEIGHTS.length }}
  estimateSize={(i) => HEIGHTS[i]}
  renderItem={({ item, index }) => (
    <div
      style={{
        height: item,
        background: '#F47067',
        color: 'white',
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
        justifyContent: 'center',
      }}
    >
      {index}
    </div>
  )}
/>;
```

<OverviewMasonry />
